title: Raccoon Removal in Yonkers, NY | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Yonkers, Westchester. Licensed experts handle raccoon infestations in attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call for fast service!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Yonkers neighborhoods, from the historic homes near Getty Square to properties along the Saw Mill River Parkway. These intelligent animals seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces, causing structural damage and health risks. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal services throughout Yonkers and Westchester County.
whyUs: Our licensed wildlife control specialists have over 15 years of experience serving Yonkers residents with safe, humane raccoon removal and exclusion services. We offer same-day emergency response, complete damage repair, and guaranteed prevention solutions to keep raccoons out permanently.
localContext: Yonkers' mix of Victorian-era homes, multi-family buildings, and properties near wooded parks like Untermyer Gardens create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The city's proximity to the Hudson River and numerous green spaces means raccoons frequently move between natural habitats and residential areas, making professional exclusion essential for long-term protection.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Yonkers typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access difficulty, and necessary repairs. A basic single raccoon removal with minor entry point sealing starts around $900, while extensive infestations requiring multiple traps, attic restoration, and structural repairs can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Yonkers neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout Yonkers, especially in areas near wooded parks, the Hudson River waterfront, and older neighborhoods with mature trees. The abundance of food sources from garbage bins, pet food, and natural vegetation, combined with accessible attics and chimneys in Yonkers' diverse housing stock, makes the city particularly attractive to raccoons year-round.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Yonkers homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause significant damage to Yonkers properties, including torn roof shingles, destroyed insulation, chewed electrical wiring, damaged ductwork, and contaminated attics with feces and urine. They often expand existing openings in soffits, vents, and chimneys to gain entry. Their waste can carry diseases like raccoon roundworm and create health hazards, while the structural damage can cost thousands in repairs if left unaddressed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Yonkers residents facing active raccoon problems. Initial trap placement typically occurs within 24 hours of your call, with most raccoons captured within 3-7 days depending on the situation. Complete removal, exclusion work, and cleanup usually takes 1-2 weeks total. We prioritize urgent cases involving raccoons in living spaces or mothers with babies during nesting season (spring and early summer).
